ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is currently associated with */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position played by the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player (e.g., 6-2) */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player (e.g., 210 lbs) */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the player */,
  "jersey_number" TEXT /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_weeks" INTEGER /* Number of regular season weeks */,
  "playoff_weeks" INTEGER /* Number of playoff weeks */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the champion team of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team is in */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location (city and state) of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team colors */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Running Back, Quarterback) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "position_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the position */,
  "position_group" TEXT /* Group the position belongs to (e.g., Offensive, Defensive, Special Teams) */,
  "position_requirements" TEXT /* Physical and skill requirements for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fantasy_leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Owner of the league */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of league (e.g., Standard, PPR, IDP) */,
  "roster_size" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed on a team's roster */,
  "starters_required" INTEGER /* Number of starters required in the lineup */,
  "scoring_system" TEXT /* Scoring system used in the league */,
  "draft_type" TEXT /* Type of draft (e.g., Auction, Snake) */,
  "draft_date" TEXT /* Date of the draft */,
  "league_fee" REAL /* Fee required to join the league */,
  "commissioner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the commissioner of the league */,
  "league_status" TEXT /* Status of the league (e.g., Drafting, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the league was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fantasy_leagues_commissioner_id FOREIGN KEY ("commissioner_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "league_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership record */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fantasy league */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy team */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Draft position of the player */,
  "acquisition_type" TEXT /* How the player was acquired (e.g., Draft, Trade, Free Agency) */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the player was acquired */,
  "waiver_priority" INTEGER /* Waiver priority of the player */,
  "traded_from_league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the player was traded from */,
  "traded_to_league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the player was traded to */,
  "traded_from_player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the player was traded for */,
  "traded_to_player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the player was traded from */,
  "traded_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_memberships_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES fantasy_leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_memberships_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_memberships_traded_to_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("traded_to_league_id") REFERENCES fantasy_leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_memberships_traded_from_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("traded_from_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_memberships_traded_from_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("traded_from_league_id") REFERENCES fantasy_leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_league_memberships_traded_to_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("traded_to_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team playing */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent team name */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (Win/Loss) */,
  "game_number" INTEGER /* Game number within the season */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "stadium_location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network that broadcast the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature during the game */,
  "wind_speed" INTEGER /* Wind speed during the game */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity during the game */,
  "field_conditions" TEXT /* Field conditions during the game */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "winning_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winning team */,
  "losing_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the losing team */,
  "game_summary_url" TEXT /* URL of the game summary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_losing_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("losing_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_winning_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
